Document:
# Plasma Weapons
[textlink="View Full Wiki Page" link="https://ss14.misfitsystems.net/wiki/index.php/Plasma%20Weapons"/]
## Plasma Weapons
Plasma weapons fire superheated ionized gas that deals tremendous damage against both flesh and armor. They are some of the most destructive energy weapons in the Wasteland and are rarely seen outside advanced factions.
Compact plasma sidearms that trade ammunition efficiency for heavy per-shot damage.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Plasma Pistol[/bold] Standard plasma sidearm. Heavy per-shot damage. [bold]Plasma Defender[/bold] Enhanced plasma pistol. Better accuracy and damage than standard.
Plasma rifles deal heavy damage at medium range and can devastate lightly armored targets on a direct hit.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Plasma Rifle[/bold] Standard pre-war plasma rifle. Reliable and devastating. [bold]Auto Plasma Rifle[/bold] Automatic-fire variant. High energy consumption. [bold]Urban Plasma Rifle[/bold] Compact profile. Better suited to settlement and interior combat.
High-end plasma technology usually tied to advanced military stockpiles or elite factions.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Multiplas Rifle[/bold] Fires multiple plasma bolts per shot. Exceptional close-range damage. [bold]Plasma Caster[/bold] Heavy plasma weapon. Enormous damage output. Extremely rare.
Post-war constructed plasma weapons are rougher and less reliable, but far more obtainable than pristine military examples.
[bold]Weapon[/bold] [bold]Notes[/bold] [bold]Crude Plasma Rifle[/bold] Field-built plasma weapon. Less reliable than military hardware.
